Part.Source: Event Start LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) RetornaTabelaFilial.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, &TabCod) RetornaTabelaColunaFilial.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, &FilTabCod, &QualColuna) RetornaEmpresaModulo.Call(&Context.EmpCod, modulosistema.INDAGRIL, &INDAGRIL) If &auxQualColuna <> 0 &QualColuna = &auxQualColuna EndIF If &AuxTabCod <> '' &TabCod = &AuxTabCod EndIF do 'montaColunas' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ TableMain.Height = 800 Cell_Grid_DWC.Class = !'Invisible WCD_' + upper(Grid.InternalName) UnnamedTable1.Width = 450 &PadObs.Visible = False Grid.Rows = 10 Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MARNOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MARNOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MARNOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) &ProSts = nullvalue(&ProSts) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = 'Consulta de Tabela Preco Produto' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ RetornaLinhaTam.Call(&linhaNumeric, &TamanhoNumeric) TableMain.Height = &TamanhoNumeric Grid.Rows = &linhaNumeric PadraoUsuario.Call('L', &Pgmname, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod) if not &PadObs.IsEmpty() Do Case Case Substr(&PadObs,1,1) = 'A' &ProSts = Status_AtivoInativo.ATIVO //ativoInativo pq é filtro Case Substr(&PadObs,1,1) = 'I' &ProSts = Status_AtivoInativo.INATIVO //ativoInativo pq é filtro Otherwise &ProSts.SetEmpty() EndCAse if Substr(&PadObs,2,1) = 'S' &ProGraEstSdo = Status_SimNao.Sim Else &ProGraEstSdo = Status_SimNao.Nao EndIF EndIF &ProNom.SetFocus() EndEvent Event Refresh do 'Mostra' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &Imagem.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWIconActionColumn' &Select.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWIconActionColumn' &DetailWebComponent.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWIconActionColumn WCD_ActionColumn' &MaisCodigos.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' ProGraRef.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &gridProNomGra.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &gridMarNom.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' TabPrc1.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' TabPrc2.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' TabPrc3.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' TabPrc4.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' TabPrc5.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' TabPrc6.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' TabPrc7.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' TabPrc8.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' TabPrc9.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &EstQtdVarchar.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &EstSdoVarchar.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &PadObs = &ProSts + &ProGraEstSdo If not &PadObs.IsEmpty() PadraoUsuario.Call('G', &Pgmname, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod) EndIF RetornaColunasTabelasNomes.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &TabCod, &TabColNom, &TabColNom2, &TabColNom3,&TabColNom4,&TabColNom5,&TabColNom6,&TabColNom7,&TabColNom8,&TabColNom9) if not &TabColNom.IsEmpty() TabPrc1.Title = &TabColNom.Trim() Endif if not &TabColNom2.IsEmpty() TabPrc2.Title = &TabColNom2.trim() Endif if not &TabColNom3.IsEmpty() TabPrc3.Title = &TabColNom3.trim() Endif if not &TabColNom4.IsEmpty() TabPrc4.Title = &TabColNom4.trim() Endif if not &TabColNom5.IsEmpty() TabPrc5.Title = &TabColNom5.trim() Endif if not &TabColNom6.IsEmpty() TabPrc6.Title = &TabColNom6.trim() Endif if not &TabColNom7.IsEmpty() TabPrc7.Title = &TabColNom7.trim() Endif if not &TabColNom8.IsEmpty() TabPrc8.Title = &TabColNom8.trim() Endif if not &TabColNom9.IsEmpty() TabPrc9.Title = &TabColNom9.trim() Endif EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &Imagem = !'' &Select = !'' &DetailWebComponent = !'' &gridProNomGra = ProNomGra &gridMarNom = MarNom &EstQtdVarchar = trim(toformattedString(ProGraEstQtd)) RetiraZerosDepoisVirgula.Call(&EstQtdVarchar, &EstQtdVarchar) &EstSdoVarchar = trim(toformattedString(ProGraEstSdo)) RetiraZerosDepoisVirgula.Call(&EstSdoVarchar, &EstSdoVarchar) &gridProCod = ProCod &gridProGraCod = ProGraCod If ProCod <> ProEstProCod &Imagem.ColumnClass = !'WWIconActionColumn WWColumnInfo WWColumnInfoFirstColumn' &Select.ColumnClass = !'WWIconActionColumn WWColumnInfo' &DetailWebComponent.ColumnClass = !'WWIconActionColumn WCD_ActionColumn WWColumnInfo' &MaisCodigos.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' ProGraRef.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' &gridProNomGra.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' &gridMarNom.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' TabPrc1.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' TabPrc2.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo hidden-xs' TabPrc3.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo hidden-xs' TabPrc4.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo hidden-xs' TabPrc5.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo hidden-xs' TabPrc6.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' TabPrc7.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' TabPrc8.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' TabPrc9.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' &EstQtdVarchar.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' &EstSdoVarchar.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' Else &Imagem.ColumnClass = 'WWIconActionColumn' &Select.ColumnClass = 'WWIconActionColumn' &DetailWebComponent.ColumnClass = 'WWIconActionColumn WCD_ActionColumn' &MaisCodigos.ColumnClass = iif(ProSts <> Status_Produto.ATIVO, !'WWColumn WWColumnDanger WWColumnDangerSingleCell', !'WWColumn') ProGraRef.ColumnClass = iif(ProSts <> Status_Produto.ATIVO, !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell', !'WWColumn') &gridProNomGra.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' &gridMarNom.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' TabPrc1.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' TabPrc2.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' TabPrc3.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' TabPrc4.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' TabPrc5.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' TabPrc6.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' TabPrc7.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' TabPrc8.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' TabPrc9.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' &EstQtdVarchar.ColumnClass = iif(ProGraEstQtd <= 0, !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell', !'WWColumn') &EstSdoVarchar.ColumnClass = iif(ProGraEstSdo <= 0, !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell', !'WWColumn') Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &EstQtdVarchar.TooltipText = '' &EstSdoVarchar.TooltipText = '' if ProCod <> ProEstProCod &EstQtdVarchar.TooltipText = 'Estoque de Outro Produto' &EstSdoVarchar.TooltipText = 'Estoque de Outro Produto' Endif // &ParamList.Clear() // &ParamList.Add(EmpCod.InternalName) // &ParamList.Add(ProCod.InternalName) &gridProNomGra.Link = VerProduto.Link('WWTABELAPRECOPRODUTO', EmpCod, ProCod) &gridProNomGra.LinkTarget = '_blank' if &INDAGRIL='S' &MaisCodigos.Clear() &gridProCod = ProCod &gridProGraCod = ProGraCod &gridProGraRef = ProGraRef do 'MontaComboFabricante' // &MaisCodigos = &AuxProBarRef Endif EndEvent Event Enter &CodigoProduto = trim(ProGraRef) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Return /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoSeleciona' 4 if not &RetoProCod.IsEmpty() do 'Seleciona' EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DetailWebComponent.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid_DWC.Object = wcDetalhamentoProduto.Create(EmpCod, ProCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &MarNom1.Visible = False &ProGraRef1.Visible = False &TabPrc11.Visible = False &ProDtaCad1.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MARNOM' &MarNom1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROGRAREF' &ProGraRef1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'TABPRC1' &TabPrc11.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PRODTACAD' &ProDtaCad1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &MarNom2.Visible = False &ProGraRef2.Visible = False &TabPrc12.Visible = False &ProDtaCad2.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MARNOM' &MarNom2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PROGRAREF' &ProGraRef2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'TABPRC1' &TabPrc12.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PRODTACAD' &ProDtaCad2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &MarNom3.Visible = False &ProGraRef3.Visible = False &TabPrc13.Visible = False &ProDtaCad3.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MARNOM' &MarNom3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PROGRAREF' &ProGraRef3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'TABPRC1' &TabPrc13.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PRODTACAD' &ProDtaCad3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MARNOM' &MarNom2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MARNOM' &MarNom3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MARNOM' &MarNom1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROGRAREF' &ProGraRef1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'TABPRC1' &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &TabPrc11.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PRODTACAD' &ProDtaCad1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MARNOM' AND not &MarNom1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MarNom1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROGRAREF' AND not &ProGraRef1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProGraRef1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'TABPRC1' AND not &TabPrc11.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &TabPrc11.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator1 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PRODTACAD' AND not &ProDtaCad1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProDtaCad1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MARNOM' AND not &MarNom2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MarNom2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PROGRAREF' AND not &ProGraRef2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProGraRef2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'TABPRC1' AND not &TabPrc12.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &TabPrc12.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator2 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PRODTACAD' AND not &ProDtaCad2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProDtaCad2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MARNOM' AND not &MarNom3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MarNom3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PROGRAREF' AND not &ProGraRef3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProGraRef3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'TABPRC1' AND not &TabPrc13.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &TabPrc13.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator3 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PRODTACAD' AND not &ProDtaCad3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProDtaCad3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event &TabCod.IsValid if &OldTabCod <> &TabCod Do 'montaColunas' EndIF EndEvent Event &RetoProCod.IsValid if not &RetoProCod.IsEmpty() do 'seleciona' EndIF EndEvent Event &ProGraEstSdo.Click Refresh EndEvent Event &Imagem.Click wwImagemProduto.Popup(ProCod) EndEvent Sub 'MontaComboFabricante' // &MaisCodigos.AddItem(&gridProGraRef, &gridProGraRef) &isAchou = false // &AuxProBarRef = &gridProGraRef For Each Order EmpCod, ProCod, ProGraCod, ProBarOrd, ProBarRef Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where ProCod = &gridProCod Where ProGraCod = &gridProGraCod Where ProBarTip = 'A' or ProBarTip = 'R' Or ProBarTip = 'O' //CODIGOS AVULSOS ou Referencia RetornaNomeMarca.Call(EmpCod, ProBarMarCod, &AuxMarNom) &ProBarNom = ProBarRef.Trim() if not &AuxMarNom.IsEmpty() &ProBarNom += ' - ' + trim(&AuxMarNom) Endif &MaisCodigos.AddItem(ProBarRef, &ProBarNom) // if &isAchou = false and not &ProNom.IsEmpty() and ProBarRef.ToUpper() like upper(&ProNom.Trim()) // &isAchou = true // &AuxProBarRef = ProBarRef // endif EndFor EndSub Sub 'montaColunas' &OldTabCod = &TabCod &QualColuna.Clear() &TabColCod() = 0 &QualColuna.AddItem(0, 'TODAS COLUNAS') For each order EmpCod,TabCod where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod where TabCod = &TabCod where TabSts <> StatusTabela.Inativa Do case case TabDtaFin < &Today &TabCod.SetEmpty() msg('ATENÇÃO! Esta Tabela não está mais vigente.') case TabDtaIni > &Today &TabCod.SetEmpty() msg('ATENÇÃO! Esta tabela ainda não está vigente.') EndCase For Each Order EmpCod, TabCod, TabColCod If TabColNom.IsEmpty() &mensagem = trim(str(TabColCod)) + ' Coluna' Else &mensagem = trim(str(TabColCod)) + ' ' + TabColNom.Trim() endIF &QualColuna.AddItem(TabColCod, &mensagem) &TabColCod(TabColCod) = 1 EndFor exit when none &TabCod.SetEmpty() &TabCod.SetFocus() msg('Tabela não localizada ou Inativa ! Informe o código de uma tabela existente.') EndFor EndSub Sub 'seleciona' For Each Order EmpCod, ProCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where ProGraRef = &RetoProCod &CodigoProduto = ProGraRef.Trim() Return Exit EndFor EndSub Sub 'Mostra' TabPrc1.Visible = 0 TabPrc2.Visible = 0 TabPrc3.Visible = 0 TabPrc4.Visible = 0 TabPrc5.Visible = 0 TabPrc6.Visible = 0 TabPrc7.Visible = 0 TabPrc8.Visible = 0 TabPrc9.Visible = 0 TabPrc1.Class = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' TabPrc2.Class = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' TabPrc3.Class = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' TabPrc4.Class = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' TabPrc5.Class = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' TabPrc6.Class = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' TabPrc7.Class = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' TabPrc8.Class = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' TabPrc9.Class = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' Do case Case &QualColuna = 1 TabPrc1.Visible = 1 TabPrc1.Class = 'WWColumn' Case &QualColuna = 2 TabPrc2.Visible = 1 TabPrc2.Class = 'WWColumn' Case &QualColuna = 3 TabPrc3.Visible = 1 TabPrc3.Class = 'WWColumn' Case &QualColuna = 4 TabPrc4.Visible = 1 TabPrc4.Class = 'WWColumn' Case &QualColuna = 5 TabPrc5.Visible = 1 TabPrc5.Class = 'WWColumn' Case &QualColuna = 6 TabPrc6.Visible = 1 TabPrc6.Class = 'WWColumn' Case &QualColuna = 7 TabPrc7.Visible = 1 TabPrc7.Class = 'WWColumn' Case &QualColuna = 8 TabPrc8.Visible = 1 TabPrc8.Class = 'WWColumn' Case &QualColuna = 9 TabPrc9.Visible = 1 TabPrc9.Class = 'WWColumn' Otherwise TabPrc1.Class = 'WWColumn' TabPrc2.Class = 'WWColumn' TabPrc3.Class = 'WWColumn' TabPrc4.Class = 'WWColumn' TabPrc5.Class = 'WWColumn' TabPrc6.Class = 'WWColumn' TabPrc7.Class = 'WWColumn' TabPrc8.Class = 'WWColumn' TabPrc9.Class = 'WWColumn' if &TabColCod(1) = 1 TabPrc1.Visible = 1 EndIF if &TabColCod(2) = 1 TabPrc2.Visible = 1 EndIf if &TabColCod(3) = 1 TabPrc3.Visible = 1 Endif if &TabColCod(4) = 1 TabPrc4.Visible = 1 EndIF if &TabColCod(5) = 1 TabPrc5.Visible = 1 EndIF if &TabColCod(6) = 1 TabPrc6.Visible = 1 EndIF if &TabColCod(7) = 1 TabPrc7.Visible = 1 EndIF if &TabColCod(8) = 1 TabPrc8.Visible = 1 EndIF if &TabColCod(9) = 1 TabPrc9.Visible = 1 EndIF EndCase if &INDAGRIL='S' &MaisCodigos.Visible = 1 ProGraRef.Visible = 0 Else &MaisCodigos.Visible = 0 Endif EndSub
